title: chaetocalyx tomentosus
intro: Chaetocalyx tomentosus is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Fabaceae family. It is also known as the velvety calia or calia tomentosa. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to help with wound healing and reducing fever. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or tincture to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, respiratory problems, and gastrointestinal disorders.
